name: CalFresh (SNAP)
administered_by: CA Dept. of Social Services / SF Human Services Agency
short_description: Monthly grocery benefit on an EBT card for low-income households.

value_estimate._note: Illustrative average monthly benefit, modeled as 55% of the CDSS maximum monthly allotment (most households do not receive the max, which is reserved for $0 net-income households). Flagged as an estimate in the UI.
value_estimate._source: CDSS 2025-2026 CalFresh Income & Eligibility Limits, effective 10/1/2025-9/30/2026. Item #220000.

required_documents: Proof of identity (ID card, driver's license, or passport)
Proof of income (recent pay stubs, or a signed statement if paid in cash)
Proof of California/SF residency (lease, utility bill, or piece of mail)

name: PG&E CARE (California Alternate Rates for Energy)
short_description: 20%+ discount on gas and 35%+ discount on electric bills for qualifying households.

value_estimate._note: Illustrative flat annual savings estimate based on a representative SF household bill and PG&E's published discount (20%+ gas / 35%+ electric). Actual savings vary by usage and vintage of home.
value_estimate._source: PG&E CARE program page, income guidelines valid through 5/31/2027. https://www.pge.com/en/account/billing-and-assistance/financial-assistance/california-alternate-rates-for-energy-program.html

required_documents: Proof of income for every adult household member with income — most recent pay stub(s), an award letter (Social Security/SSDI/VA/pension), or a full federal tax return
OR proof of enrollment in a qualifying public assistance program (Medi-Cal, CalFresh, SSI, CalWORKs, LIHEAP) as a recent award or participation letter
_documents_source: PG&E Required Income Document Guide / Required Public Assistance Document Guide.

name: Free Muni for Seniors & People with Disabilities
short_description: Free Clipper-based Muni access for SF resident seniors (65+) and people with qualifying disabilities.

value_estimate._note: Value of a standard Muni-only ("M") monthly Clipper pass, waived entirely for enrolled clients, times 12.

required_documents: Proof of age 65+ (for seniors) via a Senior Clipper card, OR an active Clipper Access (RTC) card confirming a qualifying disability

application.form_name: Free Muni for Seniors & People with Disabilities Enrollment
